SourceProxy.name: VoxelOverlapFilter

Documentation.short_help: Compares two point clouds by voxelizing the source and detecting target points outside the source grid

SourceProxy.Documentation:
This filter constructs a voxel grid from a source point cloud and uses it to detect differences with a target point cloud.
It identifies points in the target cloud that fall outside the occupied voxels of the source grid, effectively highlighting discrepancies or outliers between the two datasets.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: LeafSize
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Size of the leaf used to downsample the point cloud, equivalent to the average resolution of the cloud.

StringVectorProperty.name: ResultScalarName
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: The name of the scalar used to store the result of the operation.
